title: hordeum pusillum var. flexuosum
intro: Hordeum pusillum var. flexuosum, commonly known as little barley or short barley, is a type of wild grass in the genus Hordeum, belonging to the Poaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Hordeum pusillum var. flexuosum include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
